prompt_text:
You are a helpful assistant. Please respond to the following:

{input}
system_prompt: You are a precise, helpful AI assistant. Follow instructions exactly. When asked for a specific format (JSON, list, haiku, etc.), produce that format and nothing else. When asked a factual question, provide a concise, accurate answer.

metadata.description: Baseline prompt for the Prompt Evolution Rig

notes: Starting point for prompt evolution experiments
